findings_added.title: Round-4 NEW deep-nesting precedent: L5 sub-domain RESTART under L4 group container (§6.3.5.7.1 MB under §6.3.5.7 Microbiology Domains)
findings_added.scope: p.248 ig34_p0248_a025 §6.3.5.7.1 Microbiology Specimen (MB) L5 HEADING + downstream MB body p.248-250 atoms
findings_added.rule_application: Extends NEW7 deep-nesting model: previously L5 chain was Description/Specification/Assumptions/Examples under L4 sub-domain (e.g. LB-Description L5 sib=1 under §6.3.5.6 LB). NEW round-4 case: when L4 is a GROUP CONTAINER (plural like 'Microbiology Domains' similar to §6.3.5 itself), internal sub-domains §N.N.N.N (here §6.3.5.7.1 MB) RESTART at L5 sib=1 under that L4 group container. Each MB own internal sub-sections (Description/Specification/Assumptions/Examples) then RESTART at L6 sib=1..N under §6.3.5.7.1 MB.
findings_added.v1_4_candidate: Codify in NEW7 chain: 'L4 sub-domain' vs 'L4 group container' branch — group container case adds L5 RESTART for internal sub-domains, with L6 chain underneath each L5 sub-domain. Mirrors §6.3.5 (L3 group) → §6.3.5.X (L4 sub-domain) RESTART pattern from rounds 1-3, now applied at L4→L5 level.
